aggregate.statistics: mean, population std, min, and max across seeds

episode_reset_audit.policy: reset state on the first chunk of every episode

dataset.name: TextWorld Coin Collector level 5 token events

token_accounting.definition: shifted causal-LM target tokens; BOS has no target

interpretation_boundary: pipeline_status only gates the event-LM data/training pipeline. It is not an H-WM pass/fail or confirmatory architecture claim.
